root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sum((CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex WHEN 'M' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END)::int) as sum_male , sum((CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex WHEN 'F' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END)::int) as sum_female , count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as count_mem
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date <= '!approve_date!' ) AND (sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no between '!member_group_no_1!' and '!member_group_no_2!')) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no not in (select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where ((sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '3') and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date <= '!approve_date!' ))) ) /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
